detail.description: Mitch Garver doubles (3) on a sharp fly ball to right fielder Jung Hoo Lee.
Mitch Garver homers (4) on a fly ball to left field. Cole Young scores.
Mitch Garver singles on a line drive to center fielder Kyle Isbel. Luke Raley to 3rd.
Mitch Garver doubles (1) on a sharp line drive to center fielder Lawrence Butler. Josh Naylor to 3rd.
Mitch Garver singles on a ground ball to second baseman Jeff McNeil, deflected by pitcher Jacob Lopez.
Mitch Garver singles on a fly ball to center fielder Taylor Trammell.
Mitch Garver singles on a line drive to center fielder Kyle Isbel. Dominic Canzone to 3rd.
Mitch Garver homers (2) on a fly ball to left field. Cole Young scores.
Mitch Garver singles on a line drive to left fielder Isaac Collins.
Mitch Garver singles on a ground ball to left fielder Nathan Church, deflected by third baseman Nolan Gorman.
Mitch Garver singles on a ground ball to shortstop Masyn Winn.
Mitch Garver singles on a line drive to center fielder Dylan Crews.
Mitch Garver singles on a line drive to center fielder Dylan Crews. Miles Mastrobuoni scores.
Mitch Garver singles on a line drive to center fielder Lawrence Butler, deflected by left fielder Tyler Soderstrom. Rob Refsnyder to 3rd.
Athletics challenged (stadium boundary call), call on the field was overturned: Mitch Garver hits a ground-rule double (2) on a ground ball to left field. Josh Naylor scores. Rob Refsnyder to 3rd.
Mitch Garver singles on a fly ball to right fielder Kerry Carpenter. Josh Naylor scores.
Mitch Garver homers (1) on a fly ball to left field. J.P. Crawford scores.
Mitch Garver singles on a sharp line drive to left fielder Wyatt Langford.
Mitch Garver homers (3) on a fly ball to left field. Randy Arozarena scores. Rob Refsnyder scores.
Mitch Garver singles on a line drive to right fielder Kahlil Watson. Cal Raleigh scores.
Mitch Garver singles on a ground ball to left fielder Trevor Larnach. Randy Arozarena scores. J.P. Crawford to 3rd.
